# Layout Rules

**Generated by**: design-nexus v3.0.0-enhanced  
**Purpose**: Document grid systems, spacing conventions, and layout patterns  
**Scope**: Single component validation (Button) — full system rules would be more comprehensive

---

## Grid Systems

### Primary Grid

**⚠️ Note**: This design system does not define a grid system in Figma. Recommendations below are inferred from Ant Design documentation and common patterns.

**Recommended 24-column grid** (Ant Design convention):
```css
.container {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(24, 1fr);
  gap: var(--spacing-md); /* 16px */
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 var(--spacing-md);
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .container {
    gap: var(--spacing-lg); /* 24px */
  }
}
```

**Column span utilities:**
- Full width: `grid-column: 1 / -1;` (24 columns)
- Half width: `grid-column: span 12;` (12 columns)
- Third width: `grid-column: span 8;` (8 columns)
- Quarter width: `grid-column: span 6;` (6 columns)

---

## Spacing Conventions

### Spacing Scale

This design system uses a **4px increment scale**:

| Token | Value | Use Case |
|---|---|---|
| `--spacing-xs` (1) | 4px | Tight gaps, icon padding |
| `--spacing-sm` (2) | 8px | Component padding (Button vertical) |
| `--spacing-md` (4) | 16px | Component padding (Button horizontal), card padding |
| `--spacing-lg` (6) | 24px | Section spacing, card gaps |
| `--spacing-xl` (8) | 32px | Page margins, large section gaps |

### Component-Specific Spacing

**Button component:**
- Horizontal padding: `16px` (--spacing-md) for large, `12px` for medium, `8px` (--spacing-sm) for small
- Vertical padding: Auto (based on line-height + height)
- Icon-to-text gap: `8px` (--spacing-sm)
- Button-to-button gap in groups: `8px` (--spacing-sm)

**⚠️ Accessibility requirement**: Minimum 44×44px touch target (current Button height is 24px small, ~32px medium, 40px large — all need adjustment)

---

## Layout Patterns

### Horizontal Button Groups (Space component)

**Pattern**: Multiple related actions displayed horizontally

```html
<div class="button-group">
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--primary">Submit</button>
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--secondary">Cancel</button>
</div>
```

```css
.button-group {
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--spacing-sm); /* 8px between buttons */
  align-items: center;
}

/* Mobile: Stack vertically */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .button-group {
    flex-direction: column;
    width: 100%;
  }
  
  .button-group .ant-btn {
    width: 100%;
  }
}
```

### Vertical Stacking

**Pattern**: Stacked buttons in modals or mobile layouts

```html
<div class="button-stack">
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--primary">Primary Action</button>
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--secondary">Secondary Action</button>
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--text">Tertiary Action</button>
</div>
```

```css
.button-stack {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: var(--spacing-sm); /* 8px between stacked buttons */
}

.button-stack .ant-btn {
  width: 100%;
}
```

### Split Buttons (Dropdown.Button)

**Pattern**: Primary action with dropdown for additional options

```html
<div class="split-button">
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--primary">Save</button>
  <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--primary split-button__trigger" aria-label="More options">
    <svg><!-- chevron down icon --></svg>
  </button>
</div>
```

```css
.split-button {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1px; /* Minimal gap to visually separate */
}

.split-button .ant-btn:first-child {
  border-top-right-radius: 0;
  border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
}

.split-button__trigger {
  padding-left: var(--spacing-sm);
  padding-right: var(--spacing-sm);
  border-top-left-radius: 0;
  border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
}
```

---

## Container Patterns

### Card Layouts

**Pattern**: Content cards with optional action buttons

```html
<div class="ant-card">
  <div class="ant-card__header">
    <h3 class="ant-card__title">Card Title</h3>
  </div>
  <div class="ant-card__content">
    <p>Card content goes here.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="ant-card__footer">
    <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--primary">Action</button>
    <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--text">Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

```css
.ant-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: var(--spacing-md);
  padding: var(--spacing-lg);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  background-color: var(--color-surface);
}

.ant-card__footer {
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--spacing-sm);
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin-top: var(--spacing-md);
  padding-top: var(--spacing-md);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border);
}
```

### Modal Layouts

**Pattern**: Centered modal with header, content, and footer actions

```html
<div class="ant-modal">
  <div class="ant-modal__header">
    <h2 class="ant-modal__title">Modal Title</h2>
    <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--text" aria-label="Close">×</button>
  </div>
  <div class="ant-modal__content">
    <p>Modal content...</p>
  </div>
  <div class="ant-modal__footer">
    <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--secondary">Cancel</button>
    <button class="ant-btn ant-btn--primary">Confirm</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

```css
.ant-modal {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 520px; /* Ant Design standard */
  padding: var(--spacing-lg);
  background-color: var(--color-surface);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  box-shadow: 0 3px 6px -4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12), 0 6px 16px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), 0 9px 28px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
}

.ant-modal__header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: var(--spacing-md);
}

.ant-modal__footer {
  display: flex;
  gap: var(--spacing-sm);
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin-top: var(--spacing-lg);
}
```

---

## Alignment Rules

### Button Alignment

**Left-aligned** (default):
- Form actions ("Submit", "Next")
- Content areas (card footers)

**Right-aligned**:
- Modal actions (confirm/cancel)
- Toolbar actions

**Centered**:
- Call-to-action sections
- Empty states
- Landing pages

**Full-width**:
- Mobile buttons (< 768px)
- Primary actions in narrow containers

---

## Z-Index Layering

**⚠️ Note**: No z-index tokens found in Figma. Recommended Ant Design scale below.

| Layer | Z-Index | Use Case |
|---|---|---|
| Base | 0 | Default layer (page content) |
| Affix | 10 | Sticky headers/footers |
| Dropdown | 1050 | Dropdown menus, popovers |
| Modal mask | 1000 | Modal overlay scrim |
| Modal | 1000 | Modal dialogs |
| Notification | 1010 | Toast notifications |
| Message | 1010 | Message alerts |
| Popover | 1030 | Tooltips, popovers |

**Usage:**
```css
.ant-modal {
  position: fixed;
  z-index: 1000; /* Modal layer */
}

.ant-modal-mask {
  /* Backdrop */
  z-index: 1000;
}
```

---

## Recommendations for Full System

This pattern file was generated from a **single component validation** (Button). For a complete design system, add:

1. **Grid system documentation** — 24-column Ant Design grid, responsive breakpoints
2. **Form layout patterns** — Label placement (horizontal/vertical), field grouping, validation messages
3. **Page layout templates** — Dashboard, settings page, detail page structures
4. **Responsive breakpoints** — Mobile-first breakpoint strategy (see `responsive.md`)
5. **Composition rules** — When to nest components, component hierarchy
6. **Animation patterns** — Transition timings, easing curves, motion tokens
